title: RuneCraft SMP
description: This modpack is the same collection of mods used by the Runecraft SMP members while playing on our server! This is a pack catered to content creators but suitable for all.
body: This modpack is the same collection of mods used by the Runecraft SMP members while playing on our server, designed to enhance the experience of Minecraft without changing its core feel. It includes quality-of-life improvements, performance optimizations, visual upgrades like shaders support, and creator-friendly tools such as freecam, emotes, and camera controls. The goal is to provide smoother gameplay, better visuals, and more creative flexibility while still keeping the familiar vanilla style that makes multiplayer survival fun and accessible.
